full_text:
Sun Cheng (Xianshi) 孫丞 (顯世)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Cheng (孫丞), styledXianshi (顯世). Younger son of Sun Jun (Shuying). Sun Cheng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Sun Cheng lived during the Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
